headline: Baker Hughes’ US$10b Debt Raise Targets Energy Transition And AI Power
summary: Baker Hughes (NasdaqGS:BKR) has launched multi currency debt offerings totaling about US$10b. The company plans to use the proceeds to help fund its proposed acquisition of Chart Industries. Baker Hughes has also secured new equipment supply wins in advanced nuclear reactor projects. The company is supplying technology for AI focused data centers that require high intensity power solutions. Baker Hughes, traditionally known for its oilfield services and energy technology, is now tying a...
